title: Upgrade engine dry-run
objective: Implement a dry-run upgrade engine that compares current generated files against template versions and reports safe changes, conflicts, and review-required items.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Add a CLI command such as mh factory upgrade --target <repo> --dry-run or equivalent.
Read .harness/manifest.lock and compare managed files with current templates and checksums.
Classify changes as safe-auto, changed-by-user, conflict, propose-only, or ignored.
Produce an upgrade-report.json and upgrade-summary.md without modifying target files in dry-run mode.
Add tests using a fixture Target Repo with at least one unchanged file and one user-modified file.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: factory upgrade 시 어떤 파일이 바뀔지 dry-run으로 보여준다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
